title: FLAMINGO: Baryonic Feedback in Large-Volume Cosmological Simulations
venue: Monthly Notices of the Royal Astronomical Society
abstract: We present the FLAMINGO simulation suite calibrated to observed gas fractions and stellar masses, quantifying baryonic feedback effects on the matter power spectrum for Stage-IV survey analyses.
key_findings: AGN feedback suppresses P(k) by 10-15% at k~1 h/Mpc
Gas fraction calibration reduces model spread
